_comment: Title Pause Configuration - Customize the appearance of the 3-second title pause screen
_note: Colors can be: white, yellow, red, blue, green, or hex format like #FFFFFF
_note_margins: Left and right margins in pixels. Controls how much space from the edges of the video.
_note_font_sizes: Font sizes in pixels. Center line will be bigger and yellow by default.
_note_colors: Colors for the center line (highlighted) and other lines. Can use color names or hex codes.
_note_line_spacing: Spacing between lines in pixels. Higher value = more space between lines.
